common.disclaimer: LIBERIA is not regulated financial advice.
common.appDisclaimer: LIBERIA is a personal piloting tool. No information here is regulated financial advice.
common.defaultFooterDisclaimer: You're receiving this email because it concerns your LIBERIA account. You can adjust your preferences from your settings.

welcome.subject: Welcome to LIBERIA
welcome.heroBody: Good to have you. LIBERIA is your space to take back control of your finances — calmly, without judgement, at your own pace.
welcome.noticeBody: Three minutes are enough: enter your income, your main expenses and your goal. We refine the rest together over the weeks.
welcome.footer: You received this email because you just created your LIBERIA account. Your preferences are editable in your settings.
welcome.textHero: Good to have you in LIBERIA. It's your space to take back control of your finances — calmly, without judgement, at your own pace.
welcome.textNotice: To get started: three minutes are enough. Enter your income, your main expenses and your goal. We refine the rest together.

weekly.subject: Your LIBERIA recap — score {score}/100
weekly.heroBody: Here's your financial snapshot for the week. Your take-home is {tone}, your stability score is {score}/100.
weekly.planBodyDoneAndRemaining: You've validated {done} {doneNoun} this week. {remaining} {remainingNoun} left to complete — one at a time, no pressure.
weekly.planBodyRemaining: {remaining} {remainingNoun} left to complete — one at a time, no pressure.
weekly.footer: You received this email because you turned on the weekly recap in your settings.

encouragement.subject: You're moving in the right direction
encouragement.heroBodyTail: That's the kind of progress that counts over time.
encouragement.footer: You received this email because progress encouragement is enabled in your settings.

goalMilestone.hero100: Your goal « {goal} » is reached. {amount} set aside. That's locked in.
goalMilestone.hero80: You're at 80% of your goal « {goal} ». Only {remaining} left.
goalMilestone.hero50: You've just crossed the 50% milestone on « {goal} ». Half the way is done.
goalMilestone.notice100: You can either close this goal in LIBERIA or evolve it into a next tier — your call.
goalMilestone.noticeRest: Keep this pace. No forced acceleration needed — consistency does most of the work.
goalMilestone.footer: You received this email because goal milestone reminders are enabled in your settings.

inactivity.subject: Should we do a quick check-in together?
inactivity.since21: It's been a few weeks since we crossed paths.
inactivity.since14: It's been two weeks since we've seen each other.
inactivity.sinceShort: It's been a few days since we've seen each other.
inactivity.heroBodyTail: No worries — consistency beats intensity. If you want to pick up, open LIBERIA and do a quick check-in. We resume gently.
inactivity.noticeBody: Don't feel like opening the app? You can turn these reminders off in one click. LIBERIA stays here when you come back.
inactivity.ctaCoach: Do a check-in with the coach
inactivity.footer: You received this email because follow-up reminders are enabled in your settings.

paymentFailed.subject: Your LIBERIA payment didn't go through
paymentFailed.heroBody: The last charge on your subscription didn't go through. It's usually an expired or maxed-out payment method — nothing more.
paymentFailed.noticeBody: Your goals, your plan and your history stay intact. Update your payment method whenever you want, and your access reactivates automatically.
paymentFailed.footer: This email is sent because it directly concerns your LIBERIA subscription.

trialEnding.subject3: Your LIBERIA trial ends in 3 days
trialEnding.hero1: Your trial ends tomorrow ({date}). Your Premium subscription will take over automatically at {amount}/month, with no interruption.
trialEnding.hero3: Your trial ends in 3 days ({date}). Then your Premium subscription takes over automatically at {amount}/month.
trialEnding.noticeBody: You can cancel any time from your subscription portal — no reason, no friction. If you continue, your access stays uninterrupted.
trialEnding.footer: This email is sent because it directly concerns your LIBERIA subscription. You can manage it from your subscription area.
trialEnding.text1: Your LIBERIA trial ends tomorrow ({date}). Your Premium subscription takes over automatically at {amount}/month.
trialEnding.text3: Your LIBERIA trial ends in 3 days ({date}). Then your Premium subscription takes over at {amount}/month.
